prompt: Create an image: An expressionistic close-up portrait of the attached model, in an oil painting style with heavy impasto. Cover of FACES magazine from the future. The face is partially fragmented and deconstructed into abstract geometric blocks and thick textures. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with a bright golden light coming from the upper left creates an intense contrast with a black background and deep shadows. The color palette contrasts warm tones of gold, coppery orange, and red in the highlights with deep marine blues and blacks in the shadow textures. Visible digital brushstrokes are square and raised. The gaze is lowered, creating an intimate, artistic, and abstract atmosphere.
